title: Adding a Different Table View on a Tab on the same Board
excerpt:
I have a main board with a table to track action items from meetings. I want to be able to add a second, different and stand-alone table to a second tab on the same board.

posts.author: JMack (J)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have a main board with a table to track action items from meetings. I want to be able to add a second, different and stand-alone table to a second tab on the same board.

Having to add my second table to a different board is very clunky and unnecessary.
